# Quick Insert Library

## Ultra-Short Physics Insert
realistic fabric physics, natural draping, authentic folds, gravity-driven clothing behavior, believable tension and compression

## Anti Painted-On Insert
avoid painted-on clothing appearance, preserve realistic fabric thickness, folds, seam behavior, and natural garment volume

## Heavy Fabric Insert
heavy material with realistic weight, deep folds, and gravity-driven draping

## Tight Clothing Insert
believable stretch behavior with realistic tension lines and natural compression folds

## Cinematic Realism Insert
cinematic fabric realism, subtle micro-wrinkles, realistic seam tension, layered garment depth, and authentic material response

## Universal Photoreal Fabric Stack
physically believable fabric behavior, realistic directional stress propagation, anisotropic stretch response, seam-guided tension transfer, natural compression hierarchy, gradual tension decay, believable garment thickness, subtle asymmetrical deformation, realistic material roughness variation, and anti-painted-on clothing realism
